title: Rust lichen-oscore: Context Debug impl exposes key presence in logs
description: In rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs, the new Debug impl for Context shows [REDACTED] for sensitive fields, which is good. However, showing id_context_len, sender_id_len, recipient_id_len etc. may still leak information about the context structure. Consider whether even the length fields should be redacted, or document that these lengths are not security-sensitive.
close_reason: Context Debug impl is correct - length fields are not security-sensitive, secrets are properly redacted
